modelBuilder.Entity<ServerMemberRole>()
.HasKey(r => new { r.ServerId, r.ProfileId, r.RoleId });
modelBuilder.Entity<ServerMemberRole>()
.HasOne(r => r.Member)
.WithMany(m => m.Roles)
.HasForeignKey(r => new { r.ServerId, r.ProfileId });
modelBuilder.Entity<ServerMemberRole>()
.HasOne(r => r.Role)
.WithMany(role => role.Members)
.HasForeignKey(r => r.RoleId);
